Title: First launch shows language selection
Test Steps: 1. Launch app. 2. Wait for splash (~4s).
Expected Result: User lands on Language screen (English / العربية).

Title: Language required before login
Test Steps: 1. Tap Continue without selecting a language.
Expected Result: Error snackbar (language_error).

Title: Select language opens login
Test Steps: 1. Select English or Arabic. 2. Save/continue.
Expected Result: App navigates to Login screen; locale updates.

Title: Returning user with token skips login
Preconditions: Valid token saved in GetStorage (AppKeys.userToken); locale set
Test Steps: 1. Launch app. 2. Wait for splash.
Expected Result: User lands on Home (not Login).

Title: Empty username validation
Test Steps: 1. Leave username empty. 2. Enter password (6+ chars). 3. Tap Login.
Expected Result: Inline error: Please enter your username.

Title: Empty password validation
Test Steps: 1. Enter username. 2. Leave password empty. 3. Tap Login.
Expected Result: Inline error: Please enter your password.

Title: Password minimum length
Test Steps: 1. Enter username. 2. Enter password with fewer than 6 characters. 3. Tap Login.
Expected Result: Inline error: Password must be at least 6 characters.

Title: Successful login stores token and opens home
Test Steps: 1. Enter valid username. 2. Enter valid password (6+). 3. Tap Login.
Expected Result: API success; token saved; navigation to HomeScreen (Get.offAll).

Title: Failed login shows error
Test Steps: 1. Enter invalid username/password. 2. Tap Login.
Expected Result: Error snackbar with server message or Login failed; user stays on Login.

Title: Network/API error handled
Test Steps: 1. Disable network or break API. 2. Tap Login with valid-format fields.
Expected Result: User-friendly API error snackbar; loading ends.

Title: Navigate to forgot password
Test Steps: 1. Tap Forgot password.
Expected Result: Opens ForgotPasswordScreen; analytics ForgetPassword if enabled.

Title: Navigate to register
Test Steps: 1. Tap Register.
Expected Result: Opens RegisterScreen(isFamilyMember: false).

Title: Empty username on send OTP
Test Steps: 1. Leave username empty. 2. Submit/send OTP.
Expected Result: Validation error (required_field).

Title: Send OTP success navigates to OTP screen
Test Steps: 1. Enter registered username/email. 2. Send OTP.
Expected Result: Success; navigates to OtpScreen; OTP timer starts (30s); resend disabled then enabled.

Title: Verify OTP and new password success
Preconditions: On OTP screen after OTP sent
Test Steps: 1. Enter 6-digit OTP. 2. Enter new password (6+). 3. Confirm/submit.
Expected Result: Success message; navigates to LoginScreen (Get.offAll).

Title: OTP length validation
Test Steps: 1. Enter OTP not 6 digits. 2. Submit.
Expected Result: Validation error (otp_six_digits).

Title: Multi-step flow: store → personal → photo
Preconditions: Not logged in or from Login
Test Steps: 1. Complete Store step. 2. Personal info with valid form. 3. Select profile image. 4. Finish upload.
Expected Result: Registration completes per API; success flow as implemented.

Title: Sub-account: personal → photo
Preconditions: Logged-in parent; Add member from Home when under limit
Test Steps: 1. Complete personal step. 2. Select image. 3. Upload.
Expected Result: Sub-account created; family list refreshes.

Title: Max family members (10)
Test Steps: 1. Tap Add member on Home.
Expected Result: Error snackbar max_family_members_error.

Title: Sub-account cannot add member
Test Steps: 1. Tap Add member.
Expected Result: App switches to Family tab instead of register.

Title: Wallet card and recharge
Test Steps: 1. On Home. 2. Tap Recharge on wallet card.
Expected Result: Opens WalletRechargeScreen.

Title: Pull to refresh
Test Steps: 1. Pull down on home content.
Expected Result: Refreshes balance; family; sales list.

Title: Recent orders list and load more
Test Steps: 1. Scroll to bottom of orders.
Expected Result: Next page loads; loader at bottom when loading.

Title: Empty orders state
Test Steps: 1. Open Home.
Expected Result: Shows Lottie no_data and no_orders_yet text.

Title: Order detail navigation
Preconditions: User with at least one order
Test Steps: 1. Tap an order row.
Expected Result: Opens OrderDetailScreen; analytics OrderDetail.

Title: Sales API error with retry
Test Steps: 1. Open Home. 2. On error screen tap Retry.
Expected Result: getUserSales called again; list loads if API recovers.

Title: Switch Home / Wallet / Family
Test Steps: 1. Tap Wallet tab. 2. Tap Family. 3. Tap Home.
Expected Result: Correct tab content shown; Wallet tab refresh avoids duplicate errors per code comment.

Title: Balance and transactions load
Test Steps: 1. Open Wallet tab.
Expected Result: Balance card; transaction list or loading/shimmer; pagination near bottom.

Title: Sub-account sees transaction limits
Test Steps: 1. Open Wallet tab.
Expected Result: Shows transaction_limit_text and optional per_day limit.

Title: Recharge button on Wallet tab
Test Steps: 1. On Wallet; note WalletCard onRecharge is empty in code — verify UX.
Expected Result: Document actual behavior: if recharge is only from Home card; file bug if missing.

Title: List and member detail
Test Steps: 1. Open Family tab. 2. Open a member.
Expected Result: Member detail screen; analytics if logged.

Title: Delete member with confirmation
Test Steps: 1. Trigger delete. 2. Confirm.
Expected Result: API deleteSubAccount; list updates; warning if remainingBalance > 0.

Title: Cancel delete
Test Steps: 1. Tap Cancel.
Expected Result: Dialog closes; member not removed.

Title: Logout clears session
Preconditions: Logged in; open app menu from LoginWrapper
Test Steps: 1. Choose Logout. 2. Confirm.
Expected Result: POST logout with FCM token; token removed; HomeController/BottomNav disposed; LoginScreen.

Title: Language switch from menu
Test Steps: 1. Open language picker from menu. 2. Select other language.
Expected Result: Locale updates; persisted to GetStorage locale key.

Title: Edit profile / QR / scanner paths
Test Steps: 1. Open menu items for Edit profile; My QR; QR scanner if present.
Expected Result: Respective screens/dialogs open without crash.

Title: Change password screen
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Update password from menu.
Expected Result: Screen opens; submit flows per ChnagePasswordController/API.

Title: Delete account screen
Test Steps: 1. Open Delete account from menu.
Expected Result: Delete account screen opens; complete flow per policy.

Title: Initiate payment / checkout
Test Steps: 1. From recharge enter amount (or quick amount). 2. Proceed through Ottu/checkout screens.
Expected Result: Payment flow completes or shows server message; PaymentResultScreen if applicable.

Title: Payment cancelled or failed
Test Steps: 1. Cancel or fail payment in WebView/gateway.
Expected Result: App shows appropriate result/error; balance consistent after refresh.

Title: Missing token on API calls
Test Steps: 1. Trigger authenticated API with empty token.
Expected Result: getAuthHeaders triggers logoutUser; user sent to Login.

Title: Arabic RTL layout
Test Steps: 1. Switch to Arabic. 2. Walk Login and Home.
Expected Result: RTL where expected; strings from ar translations.

Title: Key screens logged
Test Steps: 1. Open Splash; Login; Register; Order detail.
Expected Result: Events appear per AnalyticsService.logScreen calls (verify in DebugView).
